_note: v2: capital structure defined. $10k account, $500/trade max risk, 1 contract.
_capital_note: Account: $10,000 | Per trade: 1 contract, $500 max risk (5-wide condor) | Max simultaneous: 2 trades = $1,000 at risk (10% of capital) | Daily loss limit: $300 (3% of $10k) → pause Agent 1 for the day
